### Empower Marketers to Self-Serve.

Intuitive visual tools make it simple to launch cross-channel campaigns with personalized email, SMS, in-app, web, and OTT messages.

Our lightning-fast segmentation tool allows marketers to create unlimited targeted audiences without needing engineering support.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-technical-scale.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-next-best-action.png)

### Launch Campaigns in a Day With AI.

Save time on tasks with AI-built customer journeys and AI-generated copy suggestions.

Our AI optimizations for send time, frequency, and channel selection maximize open rates and conversions automatically.

### Reduce Engineering Effort.

Iterable makes it simple for marketers to sync data points from their data warehouse to use for cross-channel personalization without engineering help.

Our toolkit of APIs, SDKs, 120+ direct connections, and integrations with data warehouses makes it easier for engineers to ingest data from anywhere in your tech stack.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/product-segmentation.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/whats-new-sms-toolkit.png)

New to Iterable or migrating from another platform? Our team ensures swift setup with minimal disruption to your business.

We’ve achieved a 99% customer satisfaction rate and over 1,500 successful implementations. Live 24/7 support means you stay successful.
